problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: Combining Federated learning without data centralization with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
